allow: Bash(python -m py_compile __init__.py trainer.py callbacks.py metrics.py config.py data.py utils.py)
Bash(fleet please investigate folder src for flaws *)
Bash(fleet --model deepseek-v4-flash "what models are you using?")
Bash(fleet --model qwen3-coder-next "Write a Python function that calculates the Fibonacci sequence iteratively and explain your reasoning.")

Bash(fleet --parallel "Review this ML project and recommend what to do better. Context: single-developer ML training framework with PyTorch, transformers, scikit-learn. Structure: src/models/ \(4 model classes\), src/data/ \(3 dataset loaders\), src/training/ \(trainer + train.py\), src/evaluation/ \(metrics\), src/agents/ \(2 MCP agent files\), src/train/ \(7 expanded training files\), games/ \(1 game + readme\), examples/ \(3 examples\), tests/bdd/ \(4 bdd tests\), config/default_config.yaml. Has Makefile, requirements.txt \(PyTorch, transformers, mlflow, optuna, langchain, pytest-bdd\), README.md. Untracked: mcp-workspace/, mcp.json, nginx-project/, test_mcp_agent.py. Areas to evaluate: project organization \(duplicated training code in src/training vs src/train\), dependency management \(heavy requirements\), test coverage, documentation, code quality, architectural decisions")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 fleet --model deepseek-v4-flash "compare microservices vs monolith")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 fleet --model qwen3.6 "compare microservices vs monolith")
